company.name_jp: エスアイマネジメント株式会社

research_notes: Found executive information on company page (https://www.si-m.com/company/). Listed 3 officers: 1 representative director (藤村基寛), 1 senior managing director (藤村隼也), 1 director (高野正一). Established 1994-11-02, capital 20M yen. HQ in Shibuya, Tokyo with branch in Sendai, Miyagi. System consulting, software development, package software, website/EC site development. Specialized in cemetery management systems (墓所使用者情報管理システム, デジタル参拝) with registered trademarks. Privacy Mark obtained 2024. KIA member.
